raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 436 removes the authorization for local authorities to adopt rules and regulations regarding cruising.",
    "Cruising is an expression of art and a cultural identity for many individuals.",
    "Cruising holds cultural significance for many communities.",
    "The 2021-2022 legislative session saw the unanimous approval of Assembly Concurrent Resolution 176, which encourages cities to repeal their bans on cruising.",
    "The Alvarez bill would amend the California Vehicle Code to prohibit local authorities from stopping drivers from cruising.",
    "The City of Sacramento and San Jose have lifted their cruising bans as a result of discussions with car and auto clubs."
  ]
}
```
